extension.news: v. 1.0.5 "Massive Expansion" - 2026-01-13 - 14 New Sites : Analdin, BdsmStreak, DrTuber, Empflix, Erome, PervClips, PorCore, Shameless, Shooshtime, SunPorno (+ Decoder), SxyPrn, ThisVid, TnaFlix. - Improvements : Ashemaletube (Refactored), Beeg, Spankbang, Rule34Video. - Cleanup : Global codebase cleanup (all 57 sites). - Erome : Full rewrite with robust filters and pagination.
